---
title: "Emma Marie Caillard"
---

## Emma Marie Caillard

**Dates:** (1852-1927)

### Description

novelist

### Biography

This person was probably the Miss Caillard mentioned in a letter to Horatia Gatty, 1880. [LG 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from June 7th 1880

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
